title: In-silico PCR results for PSSC primer sets exhibiting >50% amplification rate
author: Fautt, Chad
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: using in-silico PCR, 2,161 genomes from   the  Pseudomonas syringae  species complex were amplified using 16 established PCR primer sets, allowing one mismatch per primer. Each file here contains amplicons generated from a single primer set, with each amplicon sequence named with the GenBank accession number for the associated genome.
steps_raw: using in-silico PCR, 2,161 genomes from   the  Pseudomonas syringae  species complex were amplified using 16 established PCR primer sets, allowing one mismatch per primer. Each file here contains amplicons generated from a single primer set, with each amplicon sequence named with the GenBank accession number for the associated genome.
